summary: Implemented Phase 3D. Persisted match-history replay launch now rejects replay artifacts whose player faction ids are missing, unknown, fixture-only, or unsupported instead of creating a replay room that fails later. Added focused regression coverage for replay playback faction rejection, replay branch launch faction rejection/preservation, dev scenario Kriegsia defaults, self-play artifact faction recording, and match-history replay faction compatibility. Marked plans/faction/phase-3d.md done and updated the lifecycle matrix rows for Phase 3D.
verification: cargo fmt --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -- server/src/main.rs server/src/lobby/room_task.rs server/crates/sim/src/game/setup/dev_scenarios/tests.rs server/crates/ai/src/selfplay/tests.rs
cd server && cargo test faction: passed
cd server && cargo test -p rts-ai selfplay_failure_artifact_writes_unified_replay_schema: passed
gameplay_impact: No normal gameplay change. Kriegsia replay, branch, dev scenario, self-play, and match-history paths remain supported; unsupported future/fixture faction metadata now fails closed earlier in replay launch/playback paths.
next_executor_notes: Phase 3D is complete. The next phase can rely on replay playback, replay branches, dev scenarios, self-play artifacts, and match-history replay launch having explicit Kriegsia/faction-source guardrails. Full hook gate was not duplicated in this executor pass.
manual_test_notes: Later manual testing should start a current replay and a replay branch from a current match artifact, then confirm faction metadata stays Kriegsia during playback, branch staging, and branch launch.
